_doc: Uptime Kuma monitor setup guide — create these manually in the UI at https://status.obyw.one

monitors.name: obyw.one version
monitors.notes: Checks deploy version is present. Value changes on each deploy — use 'Response includes' with recent SHA to verify specific deploy.

monitors.name: PocketBase (WabiSabi preprod)
monitors.notes: WabiSabi preprod — may be down if not actively testing

monitors.name: Kuzzle (Maya API)
monitors.notes: Kuzzle health check returns {status: 200} when healthy

monitors.name: Caddy (reverse proxy)
monitors.notes: Verifies Caddy is serving content, not just returning 200

setup_guide.step_1: Open https://status.obyw.one and create admin account
setup_guide.step_2: For each monitor above: click + Add New Monitor, fill in type/url/interval
setup_guide.step_3: Create groups: Landing Pages, Backends, Infrastructure, Version Tracking
setup_guide.step_4: Create Status Page: slug 'status', title 'OBYW Status', add all monitors
setup_guide.step_5: Add notification: Settings > Notifications > ntfy, topic: obyw-status, server: https://ntfy.obyw.one
setup_guide.step_6: Subscribe to 'obyw-status' topic in ntfy app on iPhone for downtime alerts
